description: ANALYST issues VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 following second CLOUD_CODE ACTION_COMPLETED (commit bc30f68e579928219a9b57c4f295f6113430eb39). CLOUD_CODE has re-confirmed all five validation checks passing: (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter active (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5); (2) server-side current_task.json update step gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED present (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml exists with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); (4) governance/ledger/ contains valid ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162 and correct commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json updated with current timestamp and pass status. Upon AUDITOR VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED, TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 is CLOSED and the system advances to the next roadmap phase.
proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json with pass status across all five validation checks; ledger trail for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 containing TASK_PROPOSED, ACTION_COMPLETED (x2), and this VERIFICATION_REQUIRED event referencing commit bc30f68e579928219a9b57c4f295f6113430eb39
